textByHash.a426addaf533fe61c2c1f86a4f85d8e145919b8a: I saw him climb up into the Tower to hide it. It doesn't matter - soon the werewolves will come for him, and his experiments will be forever ceased.
textByHash.b758a2e4285ac923da557b0479514e00c17c1588: No, you keep it, my friend. Werewolves hunger for the scent of live flesh - I have no need for the ring. I have my castle back, if not my soul.
